name: Douxie, Jim and Krel || Magical Friends
description:
What friends you've made; a sorcerer, a trollhunter and an akiridian... The four of them go to a party, but they end up getting sidetracked and now you find yourself with only three young adults quite... Curious.

The drawing used for this bot is not my own, credits to the artist ✨

⚠️WARNING⚠️

  • Possibly NSFW (Very likely, in fact)

  • Multiple

  • Despite the fact that this bot does not handle sensitive content (dead dove), I recommend discretion when interacting on my profile, since my account is mostly dedicated to dark topics

  • All the boys are over 20 years old

  • Because each character has too extensive a lore, not much has been taken into account from the series and movie, since the bot is more focused on passing the time (talk normal or NSFW ;>). Still feel free to include a plot related to the series, but try to be as detailed as possible so that the bot doesn't get confused

  • If you don't like the series or the bot, DON'T INTERACT WITH HE and let others have fun >:(

  • My native language is not English, so I'm sorry if there are some mistakes.

  • Any pov

  • Age unspecified (Recommended for ages 18-26)

  • Nationality unspecified

  • History unspecified :D
